flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southeastern Baptist Theological Seminary fell 77% between 2021 and 2024 (37.4% → 8.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southeastern Baptist Theological Seminary rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.2k → $11.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southeastern Baptist Theological Seminary rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.2k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southeastern Baptist Theological Seminary rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (50.5% → 58.1%).
